summary: Verified Auth flows (Google OAuth, email/password login, registration) and MercadoPago integration. All 16 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verified: Login page has Google button, registration form works, MercadoPago is FIRST payment option and selected by default in public raffle purchase dialog.

minor.issue: Returns 503 as expected when MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not configured. Note: Cloudflare sometimes returns 520 on external tests due to response handling.

issues: Has 4 fields (Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password) but API only needs 3 (Name, Email, Password). Consider if confirm password validation is frontend-only or needs backend support.

passed_tests: Backend: User registration with unique email returns 200 + token + user data
Backend: Duplicate email registration returns 400
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns 200 + token
Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: Login with non-existent email returns 401
Backend: GET /auth/me with valid token returns user info
Backend: GET /auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: Free plan user can create 1st raffle (200)
Backend: Free plan user can create 2nd raffle (200)
Backend: Free plan user BLOCKED from creating 3rd raffle (403 - limitado/premium)
Backend: MercadoPago create-preference returns 503 when not configured
Backend: MercadoPago status for non-existent transaction returns 404
Backend: Google session without session_id returns 400
Backend: Google session with invalid session_id returns 401/500
Backend: Public raffle endpoint returns raffle data with tickets
Backend: Public raffle with invalid code returns 404
Frontend: Login page loads with Google Sign-In button ('Continuar con Google')
Frontend: Login page has email/password form fields
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Registration page has Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password fields
Frontend: Registration with valid data creates account and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Plan: Gratuito' for free users
Frontend: Public raffle page loads with ticket grid
Frontend: Purchase dialog shows MercadoPago as FIRST payment option
Frontend: MercadoPago is SELECTED BY DEFAULT in payment options
Frontend: 'Pagar con MercadoPago' button visible in payment dialog
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.login() correctly handles both direct token (Google OAuth) and email/password flows - lines 44-63
AuthCallback.js properly extracts session_id from URL hash and exchanges with backend
MercadoPago endpoint correctly checks for SDK initialization and returns 503 with helpful message when not configured
Public raffle page correctly shows MercadoPago as first option with descriptive text 'Tarjeta, OXXO, SPEI y más'
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest execution with unique email suffixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flows (Google OAuth, email/password, registration) are working. MercadoPago integration is implemented but requires MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable to be functional - currently returns 503. Free plan limit (max 2 active raffles) is enforced. MercadoPago is the default/first payment option in the public raffle purchase dialog.

features_verified.google_oauth: AuthContext.login() accepts (token, user) for direct login from Google callback. AuthCallback.js extracts session_id from hash and exchanges with /api/auth/google/session
features_verified.email_password_login: POST /api/auth/login returns token+user, AuthContext stores in localStorage
features_verified.registration: POST /api/auth/register creates user with 'free' plan, returns token+user
features_verified.free_plan_limits: Free users limited to 2 active raffles, 3rd attempt returns 403 with 'limitado a 2 rifas activas' message
features_verified.mercadopago_endpoint: POST /api/payments/mercadopago/create-preference - returns 503 when MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not set
features_verified.mercadopago_ui: PublicRaffle.js shows MercadoPago as first payment option with 'Tarjeta, OXXO, SPEI y más' description, selected by default

mercadopago_status: IMPLEMENTED BUT NOT CONFIGURED - Requires MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN in backend/.env to be functional. Currently returns 503 with message 'MercadoPago no configurado'
